headline: GlobalStake chairman says BlackRock’s Bitcoin income ETF is at level 2 while crypto natives are at level 10
summary: Staking is one of the most integral features of many of the largest blockchains in the world. Ethereum and Solana, both proof-of-stake networks, leverage it to secure their networks. Bitcoin, the first blockchain, is based on a proof-of-work and has no native staking, yet BlackRock, on June 16th, ...
